igbo.complete_a_challenge_using_fewer_than_: Mezuo ihe ịma aka site na iji ngọngọ na-erughị 5
igbo.use_random_block_in_a_repeat_loop: Jiri ngọngọ enweghị usoro n'ime loop mmegharị
igbo.add_a_move_forward_block_and_run_it: Tinye ngọngọ «Gaa n'ihu» ma gbaa ya.
igbo.drag_a_move_forward_block_to_your_prog: Dọkpụrụ ngọngọ gaa n'ihu na mmemme gị wee pịa gbaa!
igbo.draw_a_square_using_move_and_turn_bloc: Sepụta square site na iji ngọngọ ịgagharị na ịtụgharị.
igbo.you_need_4_move_forward_4_turn_right_9: Ị chọrọ 4× Gaa n'ihu + 4× Tụgharịa aka nri 90°
igbo.draw_the_same_square_using_a_repeat_bl: Sepụta otu square ahụ site na iji ngọngọ mmegharị.
igbo.use_repeat_4_with_move_forward_and_tur: Jiri mmegharị 4× ya na gaa n'ihu na tụgharịa aka nri 90° n'ime ya.
igbo.repeat_3_move_forward_turn_right_120: Megharịa 3×: Gaa n'ihu, Tụgharịa aka nri 120°
igbo.draw_3_lines_each_a_different_color: Sepụta 3+ ahịrị, nke ọ bụla agba dị iche.
igbo.use_set_color_blocks_between_your_move: Jiri ngọngọ tọọ agba n'etiti ngọngọ gaa n'ihu gị.
igbo.repeat_5_move_forward_100_turn_right_1: Megharịa 5×: Gaa n'ihu 100, Tụgharịa aka nri 144°
igbo.this_is_tricky_try_increasing_the_dist: Nke a siri ike! Gbalịa ịbawanye anya oge ọ bụla.
igbo.draw_a_perfect_regular_hexagon: Sepụta hexagon zuru oke nke a na-ahụkarị.
igbo.repeat_6_move_forward_60_turn_right_60: Megharịa 6×: Gaa n'ihu 60, Tụgharịa aka nri 60°
igbo.create_any_drawing_with_20_line_segmen: Mepụta eserese ọ bụla nwere 20+ akụkụ ahịrị.
igbo.draw_a_house_a_square_base_with_a_tria: Sepụta ụlọ: ntọala square nwere elu triangle n'elu ya.
igbo.draw_a_square_then_use_pen_up_to_move_: Sepụta square, mgbe ahụ jiri welie mkpịsị akwụkwọ ịgagharị, mgbe ahụ sepụta triangle maka elu ụlọ. Chee echiche maka akụkụ: square = 90°, triangle = 120°.
igbo.study_this_finished_square_then_click_: Mụọ square a gụchara, mgbe ahụ pịa gbaa ka ị hụ ka a na-ese ya.
igbo.notice_the_pattern_move_turn_repeated_: Hụ ụkpụrụ: gagharịa, tụgharịa, megharịa ugboro anọ.
igbo.this_loop_should_draw_a_square_but_it_: Loop a kwesịrị isepụta square mana ntụgharị efuola. Tinye tụgharịa aka nri 90 n'ime mmegharị.
igbo.add_turn_right_90_after_the_move_forwa: Tinye tụgharịa aka nri 90 mgbe gaa n'ihu gasịrị, n'ime ngọngọ mmegharị.
igbo.a_finished_triangle_made_with_a_loop_r: Triangle gụchara nke e jiri loop mee. Gbaa ya, mgbe ahụ gụọ ka o si arụ ọrụ.
igbo.repeat_three_times_move_forward_then_t: Megharịa ugboro atọ: gaa n'ihu, mgbe ahụ tụgharịa 120.
igbo.almost_a_hexagon_add_the_missing_turn_: Ọ fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ hexagon. Tinye ntụgharị furu efu n'ime loop ka i mechie ya.
igbo.add_turn_right_60_after_the_move_forwa: Tinye tụgharịa aka nri 60 mgbe gaa n'ihu gasịrị, n'ime ngọngọ mmegharị.
igbo.a_perfect_regular_hexagon: Hexagon zuru oke nke a na-ahụkarị
igbo.if_wall_ahead: 🧱 Ọ bụrụ na mgbidi dị n'ihu
igbo.check_if_a_wall_is_in_front: Lelee ma mgbidi ọ dị n'ihu
igbo.if_on_gem: 💎 Ọ bụrụ na ị nọ na nkume bara uru
igbo.check_if_standing_on_a_gem: Lelee ma ị guzo na nkume bara uru
igbo.pick_up_the_gem_at_current_position: Bulie nkume bara uru na ọnọdụ ugbu a
igbo.while_not_at_goal: 🏁 Mgbe ị na-erubeghị na ihe mgbaru ọsọ
igbo.repeat_until_reaching_the_goal: Megharịa ruo mgbe ị ruru na ihe mgbaru ọsọ
igbo.move_the_robot_forward_3_spaces_to_rea: Kpụga robot n'ihu oghere 3 ka i ruo na ihe mgbaru ọsọ!
igbo.navigate_around_the_corner_to_reach_th: Gaa gburugburu nkuku ka i ruo na ihe mgbaru ọsọ.
igbo.move_forward_then_turn_then_move_forwa: Gaa n'ihu, mgbe ahụ tụgharịa, mgbe ahụ gaa n'ihu ọzọ.
igbo.use_a_repeat_block_to_reach_the_goal_e: Jiri ngọngọ mmegharị iji ruo na ihe mgbaru ọsọ nke ọma.
igbo.move_through_the_path_and_collect_all_: Gafee n'ụzọ wee chịkọta nkume bara uru 3 niile!
igbo.move_to_each_gem_and_use_collect_gem_o: Gaa na nkume ọ bụla wee jiri «Chịkọta nkume bara uru» na nke ọ bụla.
igbo.use_if_wall_ahead_to_navigate_a_maze_w: Jiri «Ọ bụrụ na mgbidi dị n'ihu» ka i gafee maze nwere ntụgharị!
igbo.combine_while_not_at_goal_with_if_wall: Jikọta «Mgbe ị na-erubeghị na ihe mgbaru ọsọ» na «Ọ bụrụ na mgbidi dị n'ihu» → tụgharịa aka nri, ma ọ bụghị → gaa n'ihu.
igbo.paint_all_the_unpainted_cells_in_the_r: Tee sel niile a na-eteghị agba n'ahịrị agba!
igbo.use_repeat_with_move_forward_and_paint: Jiri mmegharị ya na «Gaa n'ihu» na «Tee sel agba».
igbo.navigate_the_spiral_maze_using_loops_a: Gafee maze mgbasawanye site na iji loop na ọnọdụ!
igbo.try_while_not_at_goal_if_wall_turn_rig: Gbalịa «Mgbe ị na-erubeghị na ihe mgbaru ọsọ»: ọ bụrụ mgbidi → tụgharịa aka nri, ma ọ bụghị → gaa n'ihu.
igbo.collect_all_gems_and_reach_the_goal_us: Chịkọta nkume niile wee ruo na ihe mgbaru ọsọ! Jiri ihe niile ị mụtara.
igbo.plan_your_path_carefully_you_may_need_: Hazie ụzọ gị nke ọma. Ị nwere ike ịchọ loop dị n'ime ibe ya!
igbo.add_coding_blocks_from_this_toolbox_to: Tinye ngọngọ coding site na igbe ngwa ọrụ a iji wuo mmemme gị.
igbo.each_block_is_a_command_set_values_wit: Ngọngọ ọ bụla bụ iwu. Tọọ ụkpụrụ site na mpaghara nọmba. Dọkpụrụ ngọngọ ka ị hazie ọzọ!
igbo.click_run_to_watch_your_program_execut: Pịa gbaa ka i lee mmemme gị ka ọ na-arụ ọrụ nzọ ụkwụ n'otu n'otu na canvas.
igbo.try_challenges_to_learn_cs_concepts_li: Gbalịa ihe ịma aka iji mụta echiche sayensị kọmputa dịka loop ma nweta XP! 🏆
igbo.switch_to_code_mode_for_javascript_lik: Gbanwee gaa na ụdị koodu maka syntax dịka JavaScript. Ihe niile na-anọgide na-akwado!
igbo.sub_millisecond_imperceptible_to_user_: N'okpuru otu millisecond. Ọ naghị abụ ihe onye ọrụ na-aghọta. Echekwabara maka loop dị n'ime gbara ọkpụrụkpụ.
igbo.1_ms_well_within_frame_rate_budget_saf: < 1 millisecond. N'ime mmefu ọnụego frame nke ọma; echekwabara maka onye njikwa ihe omume UI.
igbo.1ms_1s_will_visibly_lag_ui_needs_progr: 1ms–1s. Ọ ga-eme ka UI gbukoo nke ọma; ọ chọrọ ogwe ọganihu ma ọ bụ ịkwaga n'èzí nke isi thread.
igbo.seconds_to_minutes_batch_job_territory: Sekọnd ruo nkeji. Mpaghara ọrụ batch; onye ọrụ na-aga iweta kọfị.
igbo.practically_infinite_at_this_scale_nee: N'ezie enweghị njedebe na ọ̀tụ̀tụ̀ a. Ọ chọrọ algọridim ka mma ma ọ bụ ntinye dị nta.
igbo.big_o_inquiry_predict_the_slowdown: 🔬 Nyocha Big-O — Buopụ amụma mbelata ngwa
igbo.set_input_size_loop_depth_data_structu: Tọọ nha ntinye, omimi loop, nhazi data na ọdịdị recursion. Buopụ amụma ka koodu gị ga-esi gba ọsọ ngwa ngwa (ma ọ bụ nwayọọ) tupu ị nwalee ya. Enweghị akara, enweghị nkpughe.
igbo.nested_loop_depth: Omimi loop dị n'ime ibe ya
igbo.your_hypothesis_which_change_buys_the_: Echiche gị (mgbanwe ole na-azụ ọsọ kacha — n dị nta, loop ole na ole, ma ọ bụ nhazi data dị iche?)
igbo.e_g_swapping_array_scan_for_hash_looku: Dịka ọmụmaatụ, ịgbanwe nyocha array maka nchọ hash na-ebelata ọnụ ahịa loop dị n'èzí site na factor nke n…
igbo.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Adọrọ m — Gosi ajụjụ mepere emepe
igbo.why_does_loop_depth_multiply_rather_th: Gịnị mere omimi loop ji na-amụba ọnụọgụ arụmọrụ kama ịgbakwunye ha?
igbo.when_does_it_matter_that_hash_lookup_i: Olee mgbe ọ dị mkpa na nchọ hash bụ O(1) — na n=10? n=1,000? n=1,000,000?
igbo.exponential_recursion_explodes_after_r: Recursion ọkwa na-agbawa fọrọ nke nta mgbe n ọ bụla gasịrị. Ebee ka ọ na-akụ mgbidi kpọmkwem?
igbo.for_very_small_n_sometimes_o_n_beats_o: Maka n dị obere, mgbe ụfọdụ O(n²) na-emeri O(n log n). Gịnị mere?
igbo.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_of_: Enwere m ike ịkọwa ihe mere njikọ nke n, omimi, nhazi data na recursion a ji kwụsị ebe a.
igbo.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget nyocha — enweghị akara, enweghị nkpughe, enweghị igodo azịza. Ọnụọgụ arụmọrụ bụ atụmatụ nkuzi na ihe atụ nke na-eche ~1 GHz throughput dị irè; arụmọrụ n'ezie dabere na cache, amụma ngalaba, JIT na mgbe niile dị n'ihu okwu Big-O.
igbo.ai_explains_what_your_code_does: AI na-akọwa ihe koodu gị na-eme
igbo.ai_suggests_what_to_try_next: AI na-atụ aro ihe ị ga-anwale ọzọ
igbo.ai_helps_debug_your_challenge_attempt: AI na-enyere aka idozi njehie nnwale ihe ịma aka gị
igbo.toggle_drawing_layer_foreground_or_bac: Gbanwee oyi eserese (ihu ma ọ bụ azụ)
igbo.turtle_logo_s_drawing_robot_born_1967: Mbe — robot eserese nke LOGO, a mụrụ ya na 1967
igbo.move_forward_turn_pen_down_a_few_primi: Gaa n'ihu, tụgharịa, wedata mkpịsị akwụkwọ: iwu ole na ole bụ isi → fractals, mgbasawanye, polygons. Akwụkwọ Seymour Papert nke Mindstorms (1980) gosiri na ụmụaka nwere ike iwulite nghọta mgbakọ na mwepụ site n'ịkụzi mbe, ọ bụghị n'ụzọ ntụgharị.
igbo.sequencing_conditionals_loops_function: Usoro → ọnọdụ → loop → function, nke ekechiri n'ime maze ị nwere ike ịhụ. Ọ na-egosipụta Karel the Robot (Stanford 1981) na puzzle code.org nke oge a. Njehie na-aghọ nke mbara: «kụrụ mgbidi».
igbo.drag_commands_into_your_program_use_if: 💡 Dọkpụrụ iwu na mmemme gị. Jiri ngọngọ ọ bụrụ/mgbe maka njem amamihe!
igbo.click_commands_from_the_toolbox_to_bui: Pịa iwu site na igbe ngwa ọrụ iji wuo mmemme gị!
igbo.csta_k_12_iste_ct_sequencing_loops_con: CSTA K-12 • ISTE CT • Usoro, loop, ọnọdụ, algọridim
igbo.click_blocks_above_or_load_a_template_: Pịa ngọngọ dị n'elu ma ọ bụ bulite templeeti ka ị malite
igbo.goto_x_coordinate: Nhazi X nke ebe a na-aga
igbo.goto_y_coordinate: Nhazi Y nke ebe a na-aga
igbo.forward_50_right_90_backward_30_repeat:
forward(50)
right(90)
backward(30)

repeat(4, function() {
  forward(100)
  right(90)
})
igbo.commands_forward_n_backward_n_right_de: Iwu: forward(n) backward(n) right(deg) left(deg) penUp() penDown() setColor("#hex") setWidth(n) circle(r) goto(x,y) home() arc(angle,radius) stamp() playNote(freq,dur). Mgbanwe: setVar("name",value) changeVar("name",delta) random("name",min,max) — jiri mgbanwe ya na $ (dịka forward($name)). Loop na mgbagha na-eji curly braces: repeat(n){ ... }  while (x < 450){ ... }  if (x > 250){ ... } else { ... }. Function: function myShape(){ ... } mgbe ahụ kpọọ ya na myShape(). Ọnọdụ na-atụnyere x, y, angle ma ọ bụ $var site na iji > < >= <= == != .
